description: Steer provides AI-assisted Vedic astrology products, including Steer Astro inside ChatGPT and a forthcoming mobile app. Its service combines natural-language interaction with birth-chart and Panchang calculations based on Swiss Ephemeris data.
summary: steer.coach exposes an OAuth-protected MCP server at https://mcp.steer.coach/mcp for Steer Astro; no public REST, GraphQL, or CLI developer surfaces were found.
